headline: 5 Insightful Analyst Questions From CDW’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: CDW’s first quarter was marked by robust top-line growth, driven by heightened demand for infrastructure hardware and ongoing AI investments, yet accompanied by market disappointment due to margin pressures and expense patterns. Management attributed revenue gains to agility in securing hardware supply and adapting to customer priorities, particularly as organizations accelerated AI adoption and infrastructure modernization.
